summary: REQ-2 appears implemented by adding an optional blinkTitle prop to PageHeader and conditionally applying an animate-blink class to the <h1>. REQ-1 (global CSS blink animation class with prefers-reduced-motion handling) cannot be verified from the provided index.css diff because the shown/truncated content does not include any blink keyframes/class or reduced-motion override. Some non-requested metadata/documentation files were also modified.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add a reusable CSS animation for blinking text (including reduced-motion safe behavior) and expose it as a simple class name that can be applied to headings.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows PageHeader using class name 'animate-blink', but the provided/truncated frontend/src/index.css content does not show any @keyframes blink, .animate-blink class definition, or a prefers-reduced-motion override that disables the animation. Therefore the requirement cannot be confirmed as implemented from the diff summary.

hallucinated_features.description: Modified project tracking/metadata file (project_state.json) describing admin-editable content controls and animation requests.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest only asks for a CSS animation and a PageHeader prop change; it does not request updating project state/metadata files.

hallucinated_features.description: Modified frontend-file-summaries.txt with expanded descriptive summaries of many pages/components.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest does not request updating repository summary/documentation files; only CSS + PageHeader changes are in scope.
